title: Easy Trades
description: Refresh villager trades with one click. Includes Target Locking for specific Enchantments!
body:
Stop breaking Lecterns. Start Trading. Cycle the trades of any Novice villager instantly without needing to replace the workstation block over and over again. Includes a Target Lock system to automatically stop cycling when your desired trade (e.g., Mending) appears.

## Features
- Instant Cycling: Refresh trades with a button in the GUI or a keybind ('R').
- Target Lock: Select items/enchantments to auto-lock the refresh when found.
- Multiple Targets: Search for Mending, Sharpness V, and Protection IV simultaneously.
- Server Friendly: Minimizes lag by avoiding block updates.
- Configurable: Customize button position, cooldowns, and costs.
